name: @emilia-protocol/verify
description: Zero-dependency offline verification for EP trust receipts, Merkle anchors, commitment proofs, Class-A WebAuthn device signoffs, and federated cross-operator receipts (PIP-006). Node build uses built-in crypto; the /web build runs in any browser, edge, or Deno via Web Crypto. No EP infrastructure required.
author: EMILIA Protocol, Inc.

scripts.test: node --test test.js web.test.js federation.test.js trust-receipt.test.js quorum.test.js cli.test.js
